creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port has a fetch problem. Can you please examine the new tarball
and find out why it was re-rolled before I commit?

wxs@rst imapsync % make fetch
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> imapsync-1.285.tgz doesn't seem to exist in
/home/wxs/freebsd/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from
http://www.linux-france.org/prj/imapsync/dist/.
fetch: http://www.linux-france.org/prj/imapsync/dist/imapsync-1.285.tgz:
size mismatch: expected 791718, actual 739588
=> Attempting to fetch from
http://christianserving.org/ports/mail/imapsync/.
fetch:
http://christianserving.org/ports/mail/imapsync/imapsync-1.285.tgz: Not
Found
=> Attempting to fetch from
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/.
fetch:
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/imapsync-1.285.tgz:
File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /home/wxs/freebsd/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/home/wxs/freebsd/ports/mail/imapsync.

-- WXS
